titleStmt.title: SII 22.341: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 341. (A.R. No. 341 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. RUINED VISHṆU TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALLS. PARĀNTAKA I—39th YEAR (A.D. 945-46)

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Āṉi, śu. 5, Mūlā, Friday which would correspond to A.D. 946.

This registers a sale on this date of 12 paṭṭi of tax-free garden land at Piḍāriyār kuḷattūr belonging to Kaṟṟaḷi Māyileṭṭi Nīlakaṇṭaṉ, a merchant of Koṟṟamāvalampāḍi in Kachchippēḍu (Kāñchīpuram) to the temple of Paramasvāmi at Gōvindapāḍi in Valla-nāḍu, a division of Dāmarkōṭṭam. Among the boundaries of the land is mentioned a river called the Pāriyāṟu after a wellknown cheiftain of the Śaṅgam period. It is probably the same as Pālār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī ..
matiraiyum Īḻamuṅkoṇṭa kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu muppat tonpatāvatu yāṇṭu Ānittiṅkaḷ muṉṉāṭpakkam pañcamināḷ mūlaṅkiḻamai veḷḷi poḻtu naṉpakal muṉkoṟkuṟi Ikkovukkitu yāṇṭu Itu tiṅkaḷ Itu nāḷitu poḻtu Itu pakkam Itu paruvamākat tāmaṟkoṭṭattu kkāmakkoṭṭappuṟattu kkāmattāṉkuḷattu stāvaṇakkaḷ varoṅ keṭṭa nilavilaiyāvaṇam kaccip peṭṭu koṟṟamāvalāṉpāṭiperu
ñcāmi vāṇiyaṉ kaṟṟaḷi māyileṭṭi nilakaṇṭaṉeṉ yāṉ piṭāriyār kuḷattūr yāṉuṭaiya māntoṭṭam Iṟaiyiliyāṉa paṉṉiraṇṭu paṭṭi ñilamum viṟṟukkuṭuppataṟkellai kiḻpāṟkellai pāriyāṟṟiṉ meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai muttār pom peruvatiyiṉ vaṭakku melpāṟkellai ceruṅkūrār Āṟṟukkāliṉ kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai paṉaṅkāṭṭukkup pāynta Uṭciṟukāliṉukkum Icceṟuviṉ teṉ varampiṉ teṟkumāka Innā
ṉkellai Akattuñ cuṭṭappaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇila moḻiviṉṟi viṟṟuk kuṭuppanenakkūṟa Immoḻikeṭṭu tāmarkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭu śrī kovintapāṭi niṉṟaruḷiṉa paramasvāmikku Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ kaṟṟaḷi māyilaṭṭiyāṉa nilakaṇṭaneṉ Itu yirukkālāvatum mukkālāvatum Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷaṟakkoṇṭu Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭ cilavākavum veṟuporuḷ māvaṟutip poruṭcilavu kāṭṭukaveṉṟu collap peṟāteṉākavum Itu veyporuḷ māvaṟutipporuṭ cilavaṟakkoṇṭu Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruṭcilavāka Oṭṭi vi
ṟṟukkuṭutteṉ Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa nāṉkellaiyuḷḷumakappaṭṭa Uṇṇila moḻiviṉṟi Uṭumpoṭi Āmai ñakaḻnta teppeṟpaṭṭatum nirnilamum puṉceyum kiṇaṟukaḷum puṟṟum teṟṟikaḷum payatimaramum teṅkum pilāvu māvuṅkaḷavum kaiññaṭumaramum maṟṟuṅ kaṉṟumeypāḻum teṉpaṭupottum miṉpaṭupaḷḷamum Ināṉ kellaiyuḷḷu makappaṭṭa nilam Eṉṉiṟaiyili yāṉuṭaiya nilam paṉṉiraṇṭu paṭṭiyum nāṉuṭaiya parice Iṟaiyiliyāka vilaikkāṇaṅ kiḻikait tāṟṟi kiḻikaik koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ śrī kovintapāṭi niṉṟaruḷiṉa paramasvāmikku kaṟṟaḷi māyilaṭṭiyāṉa nilakaṇṭaṉeṉ Irukkālāvatu mukkālāvatum vilaippo
ruḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ muṟcollappaṭṭa peruñcāmi vāṇiya ṉāyiṉa nilakaṇṭaṉeṉ śrī kovintapāṭi niṉṟaruḷiṉa paramasvāmiyum Inilam peṟu vilaikkāṇaṅ kaiyttāṟṟi vilaipporuḷaṟak kuṭuttu viṟṟukkoṇṭār kaṟṟaḷi māyilaṭṭiyāṉa nilakaṇṭaṉum vilaipporuḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭukkavum śrī kovinta pāṭi niṉṟaruḷiṉa paramasvāmiyum viṟṟukkoḷḷavum perun toṇṭaināṭṭu muṟaimai yālum peruvaṭa tecattiyaṟkaiyālum māharājaṉ Āḷuyālum pakaṉūr maṉṟattu Uriya vaḻi Irunta villimiḻāl paḻuppāṭuṅkeṭka Irucārvum viṉāva Āvaṇakka
ḷvar Uḷḷiruntu Āvaṇaṅ kaieḻutineṉ paṭāriyār kuḷattūr kkūṭṭattāṉ kumāracanmaneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Oṭṭi vilaipporuḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ kaṟṟaḷi maāyilaṭṭi ṉilakaṇṭaṉṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ neḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ cāvaṉ vāṇiyaṉ poṟkkāḷiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kaccippeṭṭu kaṭumpiṭuku meṟkkāppiṟ kāmuḻāṉ Āccaṅkaṉṉaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kaccippeṭṭu māḷāṉpāṭi Uḻakkuṇi vāṇiyanāṉa nilakaṇṭan Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ maṉṟakkāṭu kiḻāṉ tiruveṇkaāṭaṉneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ veṭaṅko
ḷaṉ Ivai yeṉneḻuttu .—ippaṭiyoṭṭi Oṭṭolaiyiṭṭu kuṭutteṉ Ivvūr veṇpākkiḻān cikaṇṭanampalattaṭikaḷen Ivai yeṉneḻuttu .—ippaṭi Oṭṭi Oṭṭolai Iṭṭu kuṭutten ceṉantai yeḻuvan kovintaṉeṉ Ivan kaiymāṭṭāmaiyil Eḻuti yāṉnu maṟiven Amaṇpākkattu vaikānasaṉ nākama paṭṭaṉen Ivai yeṉneḻuttu
Ippaṭi yaṟiveṉ paḷukūr śivabrāhmaṇaṉ kaḻanip perumā naṉen Ivaieṉ neḻuttu .—ippaṭiyoṭṭi Oṭṭolai Iṭṭu kuṭutten Ivvūr koṭṭaiy kiḻān Āccaṉ kaṇṇatteṉ Ivan kaiymāṭṭāmaiyil Eḻuti yānumaṟiven Amaṇ(ṇ)pākkattu maṅkalap peruṅkaṇi perumā naparāyitanṉen Ivaiyen ṉeḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ālappākkiḻānc catturukoḷari ciṅkatten Ivai yeṉṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.341 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
